name: Bookclubinho
description: Full-stack book club platform with real-time iMessage-style chat (SSE + Redis Streams), OAuth2 + magic link auth, JWT blacklist + session tracking, gamification system, and CI/CD pipeline.
description_ptbr: Plataforma full-stack de clube do livro com chat em tempo real estilo iMessage (SSE + Redis Streams), auth OAuth2 + magic link, JWT com blacklist e session tracking, gamificação completa e pipeline CI/CD.
highlights: Book voting via Hardcover GraphQL API
Event-driven interactions and persistent session handling
Community features: voting, discussions, reading engagement flows

name: Resutorant
description: Restaurant review and planning platform with authenticated dashboards, search, lists, and privacy-aware social features built on Supabase Auth and Row Level Security.
description_ptbr: Plataforma de avaliação e planejamento de restaurantes com dashboards autenticados, busca, listas e funcionalidades sociais com controle de privacidade, construída sobre Supabase Auth e Row Level Security.
highlights: Authenticated dashboards with profile views and planning flows
Privacy-aware social features (public/private reviews and lists)
Application-level privacy controls layered on top of database policies
Duplicate prevention for comments and likes
Defense in depth: RLS + explicit app-layer access checks

name: Code Review Crew
description: Multi-agent AI code review system with 4 specialized agents (Architect, Security, Performance, Lead) producing consolidated reports with severity ratings and quality scores.
description_ptbr: Sistema multiagente de revisão de código com IA, com 4 agentes especializados (Arquiteto, Segurança, Performance, Lead) produzindo relatórios consolidados com ratings de severidade e scores de qualidade.
highlights: 4 specialized AI agents with distinct review roles: Architect, Security, Performance, Lead

name: RecollageFM
description: Last.fm album collage generator with drag-and-drop reordering, server-side PNG rendering, and multilingual support. Grids up to 10x10 with undo/redo history.
description_ptbr: Gerador de collages de álbuns do Last.fm com drag-and-drop, renderização server-side de PNG e suporte multilíngue. Grids até 10x10 com histórico de undo/redo.
highlights: Interactive layout editing in browser + export-ready server-rendered images

name: Stealth Reader
description: Creative web app transforming EPUB books into pseudo-TypeScript code in a VS Code-like interface — making reading look like coding.
description_ptbr: App web criativa que transforma livros EPUB em pseudo-código TypeScript em interface estilo VS Code — fazendo a leitura parecer codificação.

name: Convert CLI
description: Universal local file conversion CLI across 7 categories (images, video, audio, docs, archives, ebooks, fonts) with batch processing and interactive wizard.
description_ptbr: CLI de conversão universal de arquivos em 7 categorias (imagens, vídeo, áudio, docs, arquivos, ebooks, fontes) com processamento em lote e wizard interativo.
highlights: Granular quality control per format type

name: Questione
description: Quiz/question platform for creating and answering questions.

name: Lederboxed
description: TV show application for browsing series, managing watchlists, and streaming content.

name: Benefícios Demo
description: Demonstration app simulating a benefits card system with expense tracking and category-based balance management.

name: MCR Low Price Scraper
description: Automated price monitoring tool with scraping and historical price tracking via GitHub Actions.

name: felipe-bueno.com
description: Personal portfolio website with smooth animations, dark/light theme, contact form, Last.fm integration, and project filtering.

name: WeatherNowAt
description: Weather application built with Svelte and SvelteKit.

name: Breakstuff
description: Nuxt starter project exploring Vue ecosystem.
